topic: Alphabet APAC CC Revenue Historical Data
summary: Q4 2024 APAC CC was $15.206B (8.8% YoY), Q3 2025 was $17.691B (19.28% YoY). Q4 typically 4% higher than Q3 seasonally.
content:
Key data points for APAC constant currency revenue:
- Q4 2023 APAC: $13,979M
- Q3 2024 APAC GAAP: $14,547M, CC derived: ~$14,831M
- Q4 2024 APAC CC: $15,206M (YoY growth: 8.8%)
- Full Year 2024 APAC CC: $58,184M (YoY growth: 13%)
- Q3 2025 APAC CC: $17,691M (YoY growth: 19.28%)
- Q3 2025 APAC GAAP: ~$17,800M

Q4/Q3 seasonal ratio in 2024: 1.042 (GAAP), 4% CC QoQ growth

Growth drivers in 2025:
- Cloud growing 28%→32%→34% (accelerating)
- Search growing ~15% with AI features
- YouTube growing ~15%
- Subscriptions growing ~21%
- APAC-specific: strong cloud adoption in Japan, India, Australia, SE Asia
- De minimis exemption changes causing slight headwind from APAC retailers
